validity_boundary.cavity_geometry: single closed cavity with small aperture relative to cavity diameter
validity_boundary.aperture_to_cavity_ratio_max: approximately 0.1 of cavity equivalent diameter; above this the lumped-element model degrades

frequency_band_target_Hz.note: Closed-form Helmholtz approximation degrades outside this band for typical vessel-flute geometries; treat extrapolations as untrusted.

validity_boundary.hole_interaction: Closed-form cumulative-area model ignores hole-hole interaction; empirical correction required from tuning log.
validity_boundary.non_rigid_walls: Thin or compliant walls shift resonance below predicted f; flag in tuning log when wall thickness < 4 mm or material is unfired clay.
validity_boundary.moisture_and_temperature_drift: Pitch drifts with breath moisture and ambient temperature; record both with every tuning row.

measurement_requirements.label: Cavity volume V (cm^3)
measurement_requirements.method: water-fill before drying; repeat after fire/cure for shrinkage delta

measurement_requirements.label: Voicing aperture effective area A (cm^2)
measurement_requirements.method: measure window width x cut-up height with calipers; record effective vs nominal area

measurement_requirements.label: Effective neck length L_eff (cm)
measurement_requirements.method: L_eff = wall_thickness + end_correction; measure wall_thickness with caliper; compute end_correction from measured A

measurement_requirements.label: Wall thickness at aperture (mm)
measurement_requirements.method: caliper at three points around aperture; record min/mean/max

measurement_requirements.label: Material and fire/cure state
measurement_requirements.method: record clay body, slip, or prototype substrate; record greenware/bisque/fired/glazed state

measurement_requirements.label: Wet-to-fired shrinkage (%)
measurement_requirements.method: measure test tile before and after firing; compute linear and volumetric shrinkage

first_tuning_log_gate.promotion_rule: Promote model from 'uncalibrated' to 'first_calibration_pending_replication' only after one prototype body has at least cavity_volume, aperture, neck, wall_thickness, and fundamental_Hz rows recorded with measured (not pending) values.
first_tuning_log_gate.honesty_rule: Do not backfill measured-looking numbers; rows must come from a real prototype or stay marked 'pending'.
